name: Managing Stock Replenishment Outlet Priority
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can optimize inventory distribution across your retail locations by configuring outlet priority settings that control how stock replenishment suggestions allocate inventory between stores. This helps ensure high-performing or strategic locations receive appropriate stock allocation, improving overall retail network inventory efficiency and reducing stockouts at priority locations while maintaining appropriate stock levels across your entire retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up outlet replenishment priority based on sales velocity, strategic importance, or customer traffic patterns helps retail operators make better inventory allocation decisions across multi-store operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Stock Replenishment Priority feature is used in conjunction with the "}, {"text": "Stock Replenishment via Transfer"}, {"text": " feature. The order of the Outlets in this list determines which Outlets will have their transfer requests fulfilled when insufficient stock is available for the entire replenishment run."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTxrEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppTxrEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "stockreplenishment_outletpriority.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, there are 100 units of a product available in the Warehouse."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bondi and Queen St Mall both request 70"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bondi is higher in the list, so will receive the full 70"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Queen St Mall will receive the remaining 30"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the Outlet has a "}, {"text": "Minimum Replenishment Quantity"}, {"text": " configured the Transfer will only be created if the minimum quantity has been exceeded."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To rearrange the priority order:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click and hold the icon", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the first column"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Drag & drop", "bold": true}, {"text": " the Outlet to the new location"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Release", "bold": true}, {"text": " the mouse button"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card",
